A '''groundapple''' was a type of [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] that, when combined with [[Dew flower/Legends|Dew flower]] juice, made an interesting drink.<ref name="Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref> They could be found in the [[Stark Forests]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tython/Legends|Tython]].<ref name="Into the Void" />

{{Food-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dawn of the Jedi: Into the Void]]'' {{Ab|Dawn of the Jedi: Into the Void (audiobook)}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''
